titleStmt.title: SII 26.330: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 330. (A.R. No. 312 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Viruppaṇa-uḍaiyār, son of Ariyaṇa-uḍaiyār: Dundubhi, Śiṅga (Āvaṇi), śu. 5, Svāti, Wednesday = 1442 A.D., August 11. The week day was Saturday.

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of food and all other upādhis due to them from the temple, made by the maṉṟāḍis and the Śamaiyak-kaṇakkaṉ of Iraṇḍāyiravēlippaṟṟu, as sarvamānya-iṟaiyili to two families, one headed by Aḻagaṉ alias Nāṟpatteṇṇāyirakkōṉ and the other headed by his younger brother Kaṇṇāḷaṉ employed as tirunundā-viḷakku kuḍi in the temple of the deity Tiruvālaikkōyiluḍaiya-nāyaṉār at Tirukkachchūr in Śeṅguṉṟa-nāḍu in Kaḷattūrkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam. These two families were enjoined to look after the service of tirunundā-viḷakku in the temple, heriditarily. The signatory was Vaṇḍuvarāpati, who was the Śamaiyakkaṇakkaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Ariyaṇa Uṭaiyār kumāra śrīviruppaṇa Uṭaiyarkkuc cellā niṉṟa tuntupi varuṣattu siṅkanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pañcamiyum cotiyum
peṟṟa putaṉkiḻamai nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu kaḷattūr koṭṭattu ceṅkuṉṟa nāṭṭu tirukkaccūr Uṭaiyār tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiya
nāyaṉārkku tirununtā viḷakkuc cāvāmuvāk kuṭi Āka Iraṇṭāyiravelippaṟṟu maṉṟāṭikaḷum camaiyakkaṇakkaṉum Inta varuṣam mutal nāṅkaḷ kuṭutta Aḻakaṉ Āṉa
nāṟpatteṇṇāyirakkoṉum Ivantampi kaṇṇāḷaṉaiyum tirununtāviḷakku kuṭi Āka yintavaruṣam mutal cātam maṟṟum nāṅkaḷ koḷḷum Upātikaḷ Uṭpaṭa caṟuvamā
ṉiya Iṟaiyili Āka kuṭuttom Ippaṭi cantirātittavaraiyum naṭatta kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku Ivai nāṭil maṉṟāṭikaḷ Eḻuttu Ivai vaṇṭuvarāpatic camai
yakkaṇakkaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 26.330 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
